notes: Registry override: BUILD -> OPERATIONS. David used /focus ansible to orient, then spent ~2 hours live-provisioning Jan's Mac Mini in the Philippines via Tailscale + Ansible. 40+ voice-transcribed prompts in a human relay pattern (David between Claude and Jan). Key events: Tailscale invite flow failed due to identity provider mismatch (@ideasmen.com.au required, Jan has @gmail.com) — resolved via auth key. PII discovered in public repo — background agent split inventory into public/private. Oh My Zsh --unattended flag bug and tailscale role scope bug both fixed and pushed. Syncthing setup for file sync initiated. Two subagents: background PII cleanup (general-purpose) and Explore agent for recall failure (boulder synchronisation = Syncthing/FreeFileSync). No closing ceremony — session trails off mid-Syncthing setup. Skills: /focus.
